title: Senior Software Engineer - CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Lucknow operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd:
CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd!
